facts: FD001 (1 op × 1 fault) → FD002-4 (richer op-condition × fault-mode factorials); turbofan-degradation simulator.
hypotheses: The (op × fault) factorial is actually orthogonal in the simulator output.
Method ordering on CMAPSS predicts ordering on N-CMAPSS (the more realistic NASA successor).
intuitions: Cross-subset transfer surveys 2023-25 likely cover this comparison.
CMAPSS vs N-CMAPSS comparison papers likely exist.
unknowns: The simulator's Wiener-process degradation model is fixed, so whether real engines actually follow this form is undecidable from CMAPSS.
